title: The Pet Store PETLEAD8A Jogging Dog Lead
features: Adjustable neoprene padded waist band allows for hands free walking or jogging
Waist belt relieves shoulder strain caused by traditional leads
Shock absorbing technology softens sudden tugs
description: Product Description The adjustable neoprene padded hand grip/waistband allows for hands-free walking and jogging. With shock absorbing technology to soften tugs and reflective stitching for extra safety. Metal spring clasp for easy on/off access. Max length 2.3 meters. Available in purple or black. Tips for Jogging with you Dog: Just like humans, your dog needs to be physically fit enough to run with you and may need to build up their stamina. Try some fast paced walks before you start jogging. Consider your dog's breeds as some breeds, such as Pugs or Bulldogs, can be prone to respiratory and overheating issues. Also bear in mind the distance you want to run and the weather conditions. Thoroughly check your dog over after each run, particularly their paws, to make sure they have not cut themselves or picked up any splinters. Make sure you both stay hydrated. Guidelines and Warnings: This product is not indestructible, pets should be supervised at all times. It is recommended to regularly check this product for damage. Do not use if you notice any damage or loose parts. This product is exclusively designed for domestic animals and is unsuitable for children of all ages. It is the responsibility of the owner to decide if this item is suitable for their pet as all pets are different. Not suitable for every pet. It is recommended that you clean this product after every use. Surface clean only (not suitable for machine washing).
